Name: Hiroshima National Peace Memorial Hall for the Atomic Bomb Victims
Note: Genbaku-Dome Mae tram (3 min). Free; quiet underground memorial — pair with Peace Museum.

Name: Atomic Bomb Dome
Note: Genbaku-Dome Mae tram (1 min). Free outdoor view 24/7; sunset light is the photo.

Name: Hiroshima Castle
Note: Kamiyacho-nishi tram (10 min walk). Reconstructed castle — keep ¥370 inside, gardens free.

Name: Itsukushima Jinja
Note: Miyajima ferry from Miyajima-guchi (10 min). Floating torii — check tide chart, high tide AM is the shot.

Name: THE KNOT HIROSHIMA
Note: Hatchobori tram (5 min). Booked. Walk to Peace Park in 15 min.

Name: Andersen Hiroshima Depachika
Note: Hondori tram (2 min). Hiroshima's depachika-style bakery hall — momiji-manju at Nishiki-do, oysters fresh upstairs. (Hidden gem · Depachika)
